competitive_scores.overall_assessment: SmartLine ST700 excels in pressure range and accuracy, with good output signal, but limited temperature range and no data on corrosion resistance or certifications.

technical_correlations.explanation: Higher pressure ranges often challenge maintaining high accuracy; thus, improvements in pressure range capability can impact achievable accuracy.
Extending operating temperature range can negatively affect accuracy due to sensor material and electronics performance variations.
Stable supply voltage supports reliable output signals, especially for analog and digital communication protocols.

key_insights: Accuracy and pressure range are the most critical specifications directly influencing key customer needs, with strong interdependencies.
None of the evaluated products explicitly address corrosion resistance, ingress protection, mechanical robustness, or certifications, indicating potential areas for product differentiation.
Output signal capabilities are well met by all products, with EJA510E offering the broadest communication protocol support.
Temperature range limitations in all products suggest an opportunity for innovation to meet wider operating conditions.

EJA510E.output_signal: 4-20mA HART, BRAIN, FOUNDATION Fieldbus, PROFIBUS PA
